title: 推し事探訪　～免許皆伝編～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, Agnes Digital and I head to the
photo book release event.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
King and her entourage are so amazing! They
really know how to land a joke!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I would've been perfectly happy just seeing the
three of them perform live, but we're being
blessed with a talk session too?! I gotta send a
letter of thanks to the organizer!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hi, Digital. Do you have a second?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hwah! K-King?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I have something I'd like to ask you. Would you
mind coming over here?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: For reeeeal?! You want me to stand in?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears that a member of King Halo's
entourage isn't feeling too well, so she's asked
Agnes Digital to sub in.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-there's no way that... that I can take on such a
big role...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But surely you know all the songs, given that
you're always showing up to support my
performances.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
B-but... I'm not prepared. What happens if I get
up there and soil your glorious event?!

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I get what she's saying, King. It is a big ask to spring on someone out of nowhere.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Then, does that mean... we're going to
have to cancel?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Twitch.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Trainer?
choice_data_list:
Are you just going to ignore your oshi in her
time of need?

Are you just going to ignore your oshi in her
time of need?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: No...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: No! Of course not!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
King! If you're really okay with me, then... please,
let me sub in!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wonderful!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Remember, the stage up there is mine! All you
need to do is enjoy yourself as much as possible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the mini concert begins with Agnes
Digital performing in perfect sync with King Halo
and her entourage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The audience is enjoying the performance.
Midway through, the music changes to an
instrumental section, and I catch Agnes Digital's
eye. She looks as if she wants me to do
something...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You're so kind to cheer for me! I wasn't even
supposed to be up here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...But you don't have to worry about me. A
concert is where you show your love to your
faves. Surely, your cheers should be aimed
elsewhere.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So don't hold back, everyone! Give a big shout
and pack it full of all your love!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ready... GO!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: KING HALOOO!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Very well, I shall grace you with a reply
just as good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following that, King Halo puts on a performance
that gets the audience even more hyped!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Good job getting the crowd going, Digital. I truly
appreciate it, really. I'll give you a proper thanks
on a later date.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Pheeeeew... I'm so glad the mini concert went
well.
choice_data_list: You did a great job handling the crowd!
You did a great job handling the crowd!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've been practicing my crowd work for a while
since I figured one day I might have a chance to
do a winning concert.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Even when I'm on the stage, I want to make my
Umas shine!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And don't think I didn't notice you cheering like a
pro out there. With you in the audience, I
probably have nothing to worry about!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With you in the crowd and me on stage, we can
hype up Umamusume together!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
King! We can't wait any longer! Let's give them
what they want!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Well, if you insist! What's my naaame?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What's more resonant than anything else?

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: King's beautiful and resplendent voice!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Tell me about this stage!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's blindingly brilliant! King is more suited to the
spotlight than anyone else!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I'm the definitive first-rate
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: King Halo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! We're just getting started! Submit
yourselves to my intoxicating charm!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You were the perfect substitute, Digital. I truly
appreciate your help, really. I'll give you a proper
thanks on a later date.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Swoon... I got a compliment from King... From now on, I'm recognizing today as King Halo Day!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Don't think I didn't notice you during the King
Commendation!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, all of the fans came here anticipating an
experience only King and her entourage could
provide!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And... now I know I can trust you to lead the
cheers from the stands at my own winning
concerts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With you in the crowd and me on stage, we can
hype up Umamusume together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn on the light sticks that Agnes Digital left
with me and hold them up in both hands.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, what a beautiful sea of light! Okay,
everyone, let's paint the audience in the color of
King!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the lights in the crowd change immediately,
reflecting King Halo's colors.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wow, isn't that beautiful! Everyone's
consideration is truly wonderful.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: In which case, I'll have to respond in kind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following that, King Halo caters to her fans
making them even more hyped!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Good job getting the crowd going, Digital. I truly
appreciate it, really. I'll give you a proper thanks
on a later date.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wheeew... It looks like we were able to preserve
King's honor.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I should be saying that to you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I could see from the stage the emotion you put
into waving your light sticks!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I felt your desire to show your oshi the most
spectacular view!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And... now I know I can trust you to lead the
cheers from the stands at my own winning
concerts.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With you in the crowd and me on stage, we can
hype up Umamusume together!
